  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table):

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 過去三個月內從未發生

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 過去三個月內有發生，但過去一週內從未發生

  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 自傷行為及自殺（包含意念及行為）

  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他不適當以及不潔行為

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 過去三個月內從未發生
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",

  },
  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/ltc-questionnaire-mental",

    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-cms-chen-ming-hui-example"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-09-15T10:55:00+08:00",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "I01",
    "text" : "遊走",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "過去三個月內從未發生"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "I02",
    "text" : "日夜顛倒/作息混亂",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "過去三個月內有發生，但過去一週內從未發生"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "I03",
    "text" : "語言攻擊行為",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "過去三個月內從未發生"
